stemHtml: A DA-42 is first in the approach sequence. The pilot requests to hold because of low RVR, while other aircraft intend to continue their approaches. What clearance is the DA-42 pilot likely to receive?

options.a: To be moved to the top of the sequence so other aircraft may proceed to land.
options.b: To continue holding at the same fix while other traffic is rerouted around the DA-42.
options.c: To be instructed by ATC to continue the approach and decide at the decision height.
options.d: To be directed by ATC to divert to the alternate aerodrome.
